mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "u.id", a.dy_id AS "dyId", a.create_date AS "createDate",
u.nickname AS "u.nickname", u.icon AS "u.icon", u.sex AS "u.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_dy_like( id, uid, dy_id, create_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{u.id}, #{dyId}, #{createDate} )
